subcodes.first_line: By God! The Day hath come, yet the people perceive it not. We have sent down the verses and manifested the clear proofs, yet most among mankind remain heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تالله قد اتی الیوم و القوم لا یشعرون انا انزلنا الآیات و اظهرنا البینات و الناس اکثرهم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
